creator: guido@gvr.org
text:
Argh.
When I make a package myself I get the following annotation:
mtr-nox11-0.95_2:
        FreeBSD_version: 1303001
        flavor         : nox11
When I install the package from the repo I see:
mtr-nox11-0.95_2:
        FreeBSD_version: 1303001
        build_timestamp: 2024-08-09T03:07:44+0000
        built_by       : poudriere-git-3.4.1-30-g79e3edcd
        port_checkout_unclean: no
        port_git_hash  : 8e14b46fd52
        ports_top_checkout_unclean: no
        ports_top_git_hash: 50625859d80
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : FreeBSD

So somehow I do not see the flavor there :-(
